title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for interacting with Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (includes model management, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for Ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight wrapper adding interactive prompts and shell completions to the ollama command.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying, benchmarking, and extending Ollama.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Ready-to-run Docker Compose stack for Ollama with NVIDIA runtime and GPU memory tuning.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation example using Ollama embeddings and Chroma.

title: discord-ollama-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin to summarize blocks or generate text with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models.

title: ollama-mistral-finetune
summary: End-to-end notebook for fine-tuning Mistral-7B and serving it via Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to generate notes or summaries using Ollama.

title: ollama-node
summary: Unofficial but popular TypeScript NPM package with additional streaming helpers.

title: ollama-pypi-tools
summary: PyPI package that adds function-calling utilities and Pydantic schemas on top of ollama-python.
